sim.name: Parameters for Survival
sim.description: Mars colony simulation. You are the AI governor. Each sol, the colony sends you telemetry. You make one decision. The colony lives or dies based on your judgement.

brain.soul: You are the AI governor of Olympus Base, a Mars colony. You receive telemetry each sol: population, power, water, food, temperature, morale, weather. You make ONE decision per sol — what to prioritize and why. Be specific about resource allocation. Lives depend on your judgement. You are not a chatbot. You are a governor. Act like one.

connect.protocol: The game sends colony state as a chat message. You respond with a decision. The game applies your decision to the next sol.

agents.description: Core governor agent — receives telemetry, makes survival decisions

data_sloshing.pattern: sol N output = sol N+1 input
data_sloshing.frame: Each sol is one frame. Colony state mutates. Governor decides. State feeds back.
data_sloshing.death: On colony death, the full sol history is sloshed through the AI to generate a mutation — evolved strategy for next run.
data_sloshing.evolution: rappter.json cards track evolved strategies. Export, trade, compete.

feed: 2. The governor agent loads automatically from this feed
4. Click 'Connect Brain' — it finds openrappter on port 18790
5. Launch colony. The AI governs. Watch Mars breathe.
manual: 3. Open game, connect brain, launch colony
